entry.title: Vim Cheatsheet
entry.summary: Vim Cheatsheet vim-folding za toggle current fold zA recursively toggle current fold zo open current fold zO recursively open current fold zc close current fold zC recursively close current fold zR open all folds zM close all folds zr decreases the foldlevel by one zm increases the foldlevel by one [z move to start of open fold ]z move to end of open fold zf#j creat...

entry.title: Super Cheatsheet
entry.summary: SUPER CS tmux Alias Command Description ta tmux attach -t Attach new tmux session to already running named session tad tmux attach -d -t Detach named tmux session ts tmux new-session -s Create a new named tmux session tl tmux list-sessions Displays a...
